title: ranunculus egens
intro: Ranunculus egens, also known as Egens buttercup, is a flowering plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and flavonoids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Ranunculus egens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
